options.content: Ethereum Arbitrum Base BNB Hyperliquid Monad Solana TON
Global US West EU Asia

#### Description

This dashboard provides real-time and historical performance analytics for RPC nodes across major providers.

* Click region buttons to view metrics from different locations
* Adjust time range for historical analysis
* Hover over info icons for detailed metric descriptions

 

#### Data collection

Response times are measured by our Python service on [Vercel serverless functions](https://github.com/chainstacklabs/compare-dashboard-functions), sending requests every 1-3 minutes from three regions.

Response times exceeding 55 seconds are considered failures and excluded from charts.

All requests use latest blocks except "archive" methods (⌛), which query historical blocks (1-2 days ago).

ℹ️ If not specified, the first paid RPC provider plan (named Growth as a rule) is used for monitoring.

 

#### How we rank providers

We evaluate RPC providers based on their **speed** (response time) and **reliability** (success rate) across three regions.

* The **lower** the score, the **better** the provider
* Even small success rate drops (99% vs 97%) significantly impact the final score
* Performance is measured equally across all regions

```plaintext
Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
```

panels.description:
We evaluate RPC providers based on their speed (response time) and reliability (success rate) across three regions.

Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
panels.title: Provider score (lower is better)
What is the p95 response time and overall success rate?

panels.description: p95 response time across all metrics per provider, segmented by request origin region.
panels.title: By data collection region

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time((response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Solana", response_status="success"} > 0)[$__range:$__interval])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time((response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Solana"} > 0)[$__range:$__interval])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Success rate

panels.description: p95 response time per API method for each provider, aggregated across all regions.
panels.title: By API method
What is the p95 response time in each region?

panels.description: p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.

Each row is a provider-region. Lag is relative to the best provider in the same region. Color shows severity: green = at tip (≤2 slots), yellow = slightly behind (3-10), orange = behind (10-20), red = significantly behind (>20).

targets.expr: -1 * (max by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Solana", response_status="success"}) - on(source_region) group_left max by (source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Solana", response_status="success"}))

panels.title: Block lag timeline

panels.description: Block lag tracking summary. % at Tip = percentage of time slot lag ≤ 2 (tip is best provider in same region). Success Rate = getLatestBlockhash reliability.

targets.expr: 100 * (1 - avg_over_time((clamp_min(-1 * (max by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Solana", response_status="success"}) - on(source_region) group_left max by (source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Solana", response_status="success"})), 0) > bool 2)[$__range:1m]))

sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Solana", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Solana"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Block lag summary

panels.description: Historical response time per provider-region pair, showing trends in simulateTransaction requests.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Solana", api_method="simulateTransaction", response_status="success"})

panels.title: simulateTransaction

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Solana", api_method="simulateTransaction", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Solana", api_method="simulateTransaction"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Success rate

panels.description:
Number of slots between transaction submission and confirmation, both using confirmed commitment level. Lower values indicate faster transaction landing on chain.

Transactions are sent every 15 minutes. Compute unit price (priority fee) fixed at 200,000 microlamports per compute unit.

Chainstack-Default means a default Solana RPC endpoint (not bloXroute) under Growth plan.

Chainstack-Warp means a Solana Trader Node (bloXroute) under Growth plan.

Helius-Default means a default Solana RPC endpoint (staked) under Developer plan.

targets.expr: transaction_landing_latency{blockchain="Solana", source_region="fra1", api_method="sendTransaction", metric_type="slot_latency", response_status="success"}

panels.title: Transaction confirmation

panels.description:
The success rate of transaction landing, calculated by dividing successful confirmations by total attempts over the selected time range. Data grouped by provider and displayed as a percentage.

Chainstack-Default means a default Solana RPC endpoint (not bloXroute) under Growth plan.

Chainstack-Warp means a Solana Trader Node (bloXroute) under Growth plan.

Helius-Default means a default Solana RPC endpoint (staked) under Developer plan.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time(transaction_landing_latency{blockchain="Solana", source_region="fra1", metric_type="slot_latency", api_method="sendTransaction", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider)
/
sum(count_over_time(transaction_landing_latency{blockchain="Solana", source_region="fra1", metric_type="slot_latency", api_method="sendTransaction"}[$__range])) by (provider)

panels.title: Landing rate

panels.description: Transactions are sent through a Solana Trader Node (bloXroute) under Growth plan
panels.title: Chainstack-Warp

panels.description: Transactions are sent through a default Solana RPC endpoint (staked) under Developer plan
panels.title: Helius-Default

panels.description: Transactions are sent through a default Solana RPC endpoint (not bloXroute) under Growth plan
panels.title: Chainstack-Default
